description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a spacious patio area. A large swimming pool dominates the outdoor space, adjacent to a covered terrace that likely serves as an outdoor living or dining area. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with extensive use of glass for windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The main building appears to have a large open-plan living area facing the pool, while the smaller structure could function as a guest house or pool house. The overall layout emphasizes openness, privacy, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a large pool, open patio, and extensive glass windows, emphasizing minimalism and indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, large pool, and covered terrace area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool and the alignment of the two main structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, pool, and secondary building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the smaller structure and the pool's width.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door, minimal steps, and a covered terrace with clean lines and no decorative columns.
